nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process

nodes.grounding_span: spark kernels of creativity when inspiration is feeling scarce

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: Having AI suggest however many ideas I need to curate into a starting point

nodes.label: AI as tool for overcoming creative block
nodes.grounding_span: AI as a sounding board has allowed me to often ram through the wall of writer's block

nodes.label: AI for administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: further utilizing AI in a more assistant/administrative role eg. file naming and general organization

nodes.label: Creative inspiration and ideation
nodes.grounding_span: get the necessary creative juices flowing much more quickly

nodes.label: Creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: retaining the overall creative decisions for myself

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: facilitates my workflow into being proactive

nodes.label: Quality of creative output
nodes.grounding_span: only some needs can be easily satisfied by the AI tools readily available

nodes.label: Frustration with AI generating similar ideas across clients

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future

nodes.label: Curatorial mindset — uses AI for ideation then curates

nodes.label: Pattern-seeking and personalization — wants AI to learn personal tactics
nodes.grounding_span: memorize and piece together the patterns I have used in other projects that were successful
